Our Services

Professional lawn-care solutions for every need

Clay Soil Aeration

Core aeration service that actually works on Raleigh's stubborn red clay

Learn More →

Storm Damage Cleanup

24/7 emergency response for fallen limbs and debris after Triangle thunderstorms

Learn More →

Turf Replacement

Heat-tolerant grass installations for Raleigh's challenging microclimates

Learn More →

Seasonal Fertilization

Science-backed nutrient programs timed for North Carolina's growing seasons

Learn More →

Irrigation Winterization

Protecting sprinkler systems from Raleigh's unpredictable freezes

Learn More →
Onyx Lawn Care

Trusted lawn care professionals serving Raleigh, NC and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
